---
title: "mETHYLotest - NGS Quality Control Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    df_print: paged
    self_contained: true
params:
  df_meth: NULL
  df_controls: NULL
  df_controls_all: NULL
  df_stats: NULL
  df_global_meth: NULL
  min_cov: 2
  excluded_samples: NULL
  project_dir: NULL
---

```{=html}
<style>
.qc-box {
  background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 5px;
  border-left: 4px solid #3498db; padding: 12px 15px;
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}
.qc-box h4 { margin: 0 0 8px 0; color: #2c3e50; }
.qc-box p  { margin: 2px 0; }
.metric-row { display: flex; gap: 15px; margin: 15px 0; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.metric-card {
  flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 15px;
  border-radius: 5px; background: #f5f5f5;
  border: 1px solid #e3e3e3; min-width: 120px;
}
.metric-card .value { font-size: 2em; font-weight: bold; }
.metric-card .label { color: #666; font-size: 0.9em; }
.warn-card     { border-left-color: #e74c3c; background: #fef2f2; }
.ok-card       { border-left-color: #27ae60; background: #f0faf0; }
.excluded-card { border-left-color: #e67e22; background: #fef5e7; }
.info-card     { border-left-color: #8e44ad; background: #f5eef8; }
</style>
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ── Force figures to a LOCAL temp dir (avoids UNC/pandoc bug) ──
local_fig_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), "methylflow_qc_figs/")
if (!dir.exists(local_fig_dir)) dir.create(local_fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  dpi = 100,
  fig.path = local_fig_dir
)

library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(knitr)

df_meth     <- params$df_meth
df_controls <- params$df_controls
df_stats    <- params$df_stats
min_cov     <- params$min_cov

# =====================================================================
# Load excluded samples (multiple sources for robustness)
# =====================================================================
excluded_from_params <- params$excluded_samples
if (is.null(excluded_from_params)) excluded_from_params <- character(0)

excluded_from_rds <- character(0)
if (!is.null(params$project_dir)) {
  rds_path <- file.path(params$project_dir, "data", "interim",
                         "excluded_samples.rds")
  if (file.exists(rds_path)) {
    excluded_from_rds <- tryCatch(readRDS(rds_path),
                                   error = function(e) character(0))
  }
}

excluded <- unique(c(excluded_from_params, excluded_from_rds))
excluded <- excluded[nzchar(excluded)]

# =====================================================================
# Load QC params
# =====================================================================
qc_params <- NULL
if (!is.null(params$project_dir)) {
  qcp_path <- file.path(params$project_dir, "data", "interim",
                          "qc_final_params.rds")
  if (file.exists(qcp_path)) {
    qc_params <- tryCatch(readRDS(qcp_path), error = function(e) NULL)
  }
}

# =====================================================================
# Load control genome data for ALL samples (including excluded)
# Priority: params > RDS file
# =====================================================================
df_controls_all <- params$df_controls_all

if (is.null(df_controls_all) && !is.null(params$project_dir)) {
  ctrl_rds <- file.path(params$project_dir, "data", "interim",
                          "control_genomes_all_samples.rds")
  if (file.exists(ctrl_rds)) {
    df_controls_all <- tryCatch(readRDS(ctrl_rds),
                                 error = function(e) NULL)
  }
}

# Build merged control dataset
df_controls_merged <- NULL

if (!is.null(df_controls_all) && is.data.frame(df_controls_all) &&
    nrow(df_controls_all) > 0) {
  df_controls_merged <- df_controls_all
  df_controls_merged$Status <- ifelse(
    df_controls_merged$Sample %in% excluded, "Excluded", "Analysed")
} else if (!is.null(df_controls) && is.data.frame(df_controls) &&
           nrow(df_controls) > 0) {
  df_controls_merged <- df_controls
  df_controls_merged$Status <- "Analysed"
}

# =====================================================================
# Load global methylation per sample
# Priority: params > RDS file
# =====================================================================
df_global_meth <- params$df_global_meth

if (is.null(df_global_meth) && !is.null(params$project_dir)) {
  gm_rds <- file.path(params$project_dir, "data", "interim",
                        "global_methylation_per_sample.rds")
  if (file.exists(gm_rds)) {
    df_global_meth <- tryCatch(readRDS(gm_rds), error = function(e) NULL)
  }
}
```

# QC Summary

```{r qc_summary}
n_excluded <- length(excluded)

# ── Use qc_params as authoritative source ──
if (!is.null(qc_params) && !is.null(qc_params$analyzed_sample_ids)) {
  n_samples  <- length(qc_params$analyzed_sample_ids)
  n_original <- length(qc_params$original_sample_ids)
} else {
  n_samples  <- if (!is.null(df_stats))
    length(unique(df_stats$Sample)) else 0L
  n_original <- n_samples + n_excluded
}

div(class = "qc-box",
    h4("QC Parameters"),
    p(strong("Minimum coverage: "), min_cov, "x"),
    p(strong("Original samples: "), n_original),
    p(strong("Samples analysed: "), n_samples),
    p(strong("Samples excluded: "),
      if (n_excluded == 0L) "None"
      else paste0(n_excluded, " -- ", paste(excluded, collapse = ", "))),
    if (!is.null(qc_params))
      p(strong("QC iterations: "), qc_params$n_iterations)
)
```

```{r excluded_detail, results='asis'}
if (n_excluded > 0L) {
  cat('<div class="qc-box excluded-card">\n')
  cat('<h4>Excluded Samples</h4>\n')
  cat('<p>The following samples were removed during QC and are ')
  cat('<strong>not included</strong> in downstream analyses:</p>\n')
  cat('<ul>\n')
  for (ex_id in excluded) {
    cat(sprintf('<li><strong>%s</strong></li>\n', ex_id))
  }
  cat('</ul>\n')
  cat('<p><em>Reasons: manual exclusion via QC interface, ')
  cat('empty after coverage filtering, or insufficient data.</em></p>\n')
  cat('</div>\n')
}
```

```{r qc_metrics}
if (!is.null(df_stats) && nrow(df_stats) > 0) {
  total_positions <- sum(df_stats$PositionCount[df_stats$Type == "Individual"],
                          na.rm = TRUE)
  avg_per_sample <- if (n_samples > 0)
    round(total_positions / n_samples) else 0

  # Get true original count from saved QC params
  n_original <- if (!is.null(qc_params) &&
                    !is.null(qc_params$original_sample_ids))
    length(qc_params$original_sample_ids)
  else
    n_samples + n_excluded

  div(class = "metric-row",
      div(class = "metric-card",
          div(class = "value", format(n_original, big.mark = ",")),
          div(class = "label", "Original Samples")),
      div(class = "metric-card",
          tags$div(class = "value", style = "color:#27ae60;",
              format(n_samples, big.mark = ",")),
          div(class = "label", "Analysed Samples")),
      if (n_excluded > 0)
        div(class = "metric-card",
            tags$div(class = "value", style = "color:#e67e22;",
                     format(n_excluded, big.mark = ",")),
            div(class = "label", "Excluded Samples")),
      div(class = "metric-card",
          div(class = "value",
              format(avg_per_sample, big.mark = ",")),
          div(class = "label", "Avg positions/sample")),
      div(class = "metric-card",
          div(class = "value", paste0(min_cov, "x")),
          div(class = "label", "Min coverage"))
  )
}
```

---

# Coverage Statistics

```{r coverage_barplot}
if (!is.null(df_stats) && nrow(df_stats) > 0) {
  total_positions <- sum(df_stats$PositionCount[df_stats$Type == "Individual"],
                          na.rm = TRUE)

  # ── Get TRUE counts from qc_params (authoritative) ──
  if (!is.null(qc_params) &&
      !is.null(qc_params$original_sample_ids) &&
      !is.null(qc_params$analyzed_sample_ids)) {
    n_original <- length(qc_params$original_sample_ids)
    n_analysed <- length(qc_params$analyzed_sample_ids)
  } else {
    # Fallback: derive from df_stats
    n_original <- n_samples + n_excluded
    n_analysed <- n_samples
  }

  avg_per_sample <- if (n_analysed > 0)
    round(total_positions / n_analysed) else 0

  div(class = "metric-row",
      div(class = "metric-card",
          div(class = "value", format(n_original, big.mark = ",")),
          div(class = "label", "Original Samples")),
      div(class = "metric-card",
          tags$div(class = "value", style = "color:#27ae60;",
              format(n_analysed, big.mark = ",")),
          div(class = "label", "Analysed Samples")),
      if (n_excluded > 0)
        div(class = "metric-card",
            tags$div(class = "value", style = "color:#e67e22;",
                     format(n_excluded, big.mark = ",")),
            div(class = "label", "Excluded Samples")),
      div(class = "metric-card",
          div(class = "value",
              format(avg_per_sample, big.mark = ",")),
          div(class = "label", "Avg positions/sample")),
      div(class = "metric-card",
          div(class = "value", paste0(min_cov, "x")),
          div(class = "label", "Min coverage"))
  )

  # ── Sanity check ──
  if (n_original != n_analysed + n_excluded) {
    cat(sprintf(
      '<div class="qc-box warn-card"><p><strong>Note:</strong> %d original - %d excluded = %d, but %d samples found in data. Some samples may have been added or removed outside the QC pipeline.</p></div>\n',
      n_original, n_excluded, n_original - n_excluded, n_analysed))
  }
}
```

```{r coverage_table}
if (!is.null(df_stats) && nrow(df_stats) > 0) {
  summary_wide <- df_stats %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Type,
                       values_from = PositionCount,
                       values_fill = 0)

  if ("Individual" %in% colnames(summary_wide) &&
      "Common" %in% colnames(summary_wide)) {
    summary_wide$Pct_Common <- round(
      summary_wide$Common / summary_wide$Individual * 100, 1)
  }

  datatable(summary_wide,
            options = list(pageLength = 20, dom = "t"),
            caption = "Position counts per sample")
}
```

---

# Global Methylation

```{r global_meth, fig.height=5, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(df_global_meth) && nrow(df_global_meth) > 0) {

  # ── Group summary ──
  if ("Group" %in% colnames(df_global_meth)) {
    ctrl_rows <- df_global_meth[df_global_meth$Group == "Control (0)", ]
    case_rows <- df_global_meth[df_global_meth$Group == "Case (1)", ]
    ctrl_m <- if (nrow(ctrl_rows) > 0) round(mean(ctrl_rows$Global_Meth_Pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1) else NA
    ctrl_s <- if (nrow(ctrl_rows) > 1) round(sd(ctrl_rows$Global_Meth_Pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1) else NA
    case_m <- if (nrow(case_rows) > 0) round(mean(case_rows$Global_Meth_Pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1) else NA
    case_s <- if (nrow(case_rows) > 1) round(sd(case_rows$Global_Meth_Pct, na.rm = TRUE), 1) else NA

    cat('<div class="metric-row">\n')
    if (!is.na(ctrl_m)) {
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#27ae60;">%.1f%%</div><div class="label">Control avg%s</div></div>\n',
                  ctrl_m, if (!is.na(ctrl_s)) sprintf(" (+/- %.1f)", ctrl_s) else ""))
    }
    if (!is.na(case_m)) {
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:#e74c3c;">%.1f%%</div><div class="label">Case avg%s</div></div>\n',
                  case_m, if (!is.na(case_s)) sprintf(" (+/- %.1f)", case_s) else ""))
    }
    if (!is.na(ctrl_m) && !is.na(case_m)) {
      delta <- round(case_m - ctrl_m, 1)
      delta_col <- if (abs(delta) > 5) "#e74c3c" else "#95a5a6"
      cat(sprintf('<div class="metric-card"><div class="value" style="color:%s;">%+.1f%%</div><div class="label">Delta (Case - Control)</div></div>\n',
                  delta_col, delta))
    }
    cat('</div>\n\n')
  }

  # ── Per-sample barplot ──
  group_colors <- c("Control (0)" = "#27ae60", "Case (1)" = "#e74c3c", "Unknown" = "#95a5a6")

  if ("Group" %in% colnames(df_global_meth)) {
    p_bar <- ggplot(df_global_meth,
                     aes(x = reorder(Sample, Global_Meth_Pct),
                         y = Global_Meth_Pct, fill = Group)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = "Global Methylation per Sample",
           x = "", y = "Global Methylation (%)", fill = "Group") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
  } else {
    p_bar <- ggplot(df_global_meth,
                     aes(x = reorder(Sample, Global_Meth_Pct),
                         y = Global_Meth_Pct)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "#3498db") +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = "Global Methylation per Sample",
           x = "", y = "Global Methylation (%)") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
  }
  print(p_bar)
  cat("\n\n")

  # ── Boxplot Control vs Case ──
  if ("Group" %in% colnames(df_global_meth)) {
    gm_plot <- df_global_meth[df_global_meth$Group != "Unknown", ]
    if (nrow(gm_plot) > 0 && length(unique(gm_plot$Group)) >= 2) {
      p_box <- ggplot(gm_plot,
                       aes(x = Group, y = Global_Meth_Pct, fill = Group)) +
        geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.5) +
        geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 3, alpha = 0.8,
                     aes(colour = Group)) +
        scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
        scale_colour_manual(values = group_colors) +
        labs(title = "Global Methylation: Control vs Case",
             subtitle = if (!is.na(ctrl_m) && !is.na(case_m))
               sprintf("CTL: %.1f%% | Case: %.1f%% | Delta: %+.1f%%",
                       ctrl_m, case_m, case_m - ctrl_m) else "",
             x = "", y = "Global Methylation (%)") +
        theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
        theme(legend.position = "none")
      print(p_box)
    }
  }

  cat("\n\n")

  # ── Data table ──
  cols_show <- intersect(
    c("Sample", "Global_Meth_Pct", "N_Positions", "Total_Reads", "Group"),
    colnames(df_global_meth))
  dt <- datatable(df_global_meth[, cols_show],
                  options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 25),
                  caption = "Global methylation per sample")
  if ("Global_Meth_Pct" %in% cols_show) {
    dt <- DT::formatRound(dt, columns = "Global_Meth_Pct", digits = 2)
  }
  if ("Group" %in% cols_show) {
    dt <- DT::formatStyle(dt, "Group",
                           color = DT::styleEqual(
                             c("Control (0)", "Case (1)"),
                             c("#27ae60", "#e74c3c")),
                           fontWeight = "bold")
  }
  dt

} else {
  cat("Global methylation data not available.\n")
}
```

---

# Methylation Profile by Chromosome

```{r meth_profile_bar, fig.height=8}
if (!is.null(df_meth) && nrow(df_meth) > 0) {

  chr_levels <- c(paste0("chr", 1:22), "chrX", "chrY", "chrM")
  present    <- intersect(chr_levels, unique(df_meth$chr))
  others     <- setdiff(unique(df_meth$chr), chr_levels)
  df_meth$chr <- factor(df_meth$chr,
                          levels = c(present, sort(others)))

  p <- ggplot(df_meth,
              aes(x = chr, y = avg_methylation, fill = Sample,
                  text = paste0("Sample: ", Sample,
                                "<br>Chr: ", chr,
                                "<br>Meth: ",
                                round(avg_methylation, 1), "%"))) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    labs(title = "Average Methylation per Chromosome",
         y = "Methylation (%)", x = "") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1,
                                      vjust = 0.5))

  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")
} else {
  cat("Methylation profile data not available.")
}
```

```{r meth_heatmap, fig.height=7}
if (!is.null(df_meth) && nrow(df_meth) > 0) {

  mat <- tidyr::pivot_wider(
    df_meth[, c("Sample", "chr", "avg_methylation")],
    names_from = Sample,
    values_from = avg_methylation)

  chr_col <- mat$chr
  mat$chr <- NULL
  mat_num <- as.matrix(mat)
  rownames(mat_num) <- chr_col

  if (nrow(mat_num) > 1 && ncol(mat_num) > 1) {
    p_heat <- plot_ly(
      z = mat_num,
      x = colnames(mat_num),
      y = rownames(mat_num),
      type = "heatmap",
      colorscale = list(c(0, "#3498db"), c(0.5, "#f1c40f"),
                        c(1, "#e74c3c")),
      zmin = 0, zmax = 100
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = "Methylation Heatmap (Samples x Chromosomes)",
        xaxis = list(title = ""),
        yaxis = list(title = "", autorange = "reversed"))

    p_heat
  }
}
```

## Per-Sample Methylation Distribution

```{r meth_boxplot}
if (!is.null(df_meth) && nrow(df_meth) > 0) {
  p <- ggplot(df_meth,
              aes(x = Sample, y = avg_methylation,
                  fill = Sample)) +
    geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.size = 1) +
    labs(title = "Methylation Distribution per Sample",
         y = "Methylation (%)", x = "") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "none")

  ggplotly(p)
}
```

---

# Control Genomes {.tabset}

## All Samples (including excluded)

```{r controls_all, fig.height=6, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(df_controls_merged) && nrow(df_controls_merged) > 0) {

  cat('<div class="qc-box">\n')
  cat('<h4>Control Genome Methylation</h4>\n')
  cat('<table class="table table-bordered" style="width:auto; margin:10px 0;">\n')
  cat('<thead><tr><th>Control</th><th>Expected</th><th>Interpretation</th></tr></thead>\n')
  cat('<tbody>\n')
  cat('<tr><td><strong>pUC19</strong></td>')
  cat('<td style="color:#c0392b; font-weight:bold;">~100%</td>')
  cat('<td>Methylated spike-in. Low methylation = over-conversion.</td></tr>\n')
  cat('<tr><td><strong>NC_000913 (E. coli)</strong></td>')
  cat('<td style="color:#2980b9; font-weight:bold;">~0%</td>')
  cat('<td>Unmethylated control. High methylation = incomplete conversion.</td></tr>\n')
  cat('<tr><td><strong>Lambda</strong></td>')
  cat('<td style="color:#2980b9; font-weight:bold;">~0%</td>')
  cat('<td>Unmethylated control. High methylation = incomplete conversion.</td></tr>\n')
  cat('</tbody></table>\n')

  excl_names <- unique(
    df_controls_merged$Sample[df_controls_merged$Status == "Excluded"])
  if (length(excl_names) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf(
      '<p><strong>Note:</strong> Includes %d excluded sample(s): %s (marked with *)</p>\n',
      length(excl_names), paste(excl_names, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  cat('</div>\n\n')

  # ── Labels ──
  df_controls_merged$SampleLabel <- ifelse(
    df_controls_merged$Status == "Excluded",
    paste0(df_controls_merged$Sample, " *"),
    df_controls_merged$Sample
  )

  if ("ExpectedMeth" %in% colnames(df_controls_merged)) {
    df_controls_merged$ControlType <- ifelse(
      df_controls_merged$ExpectedMeth == "high",
      paste0(df_controls_merged$Chromosome, " (expect HIGH)"),
      paste0(df_controls_merged$Chromosome, " (expect LOW)")
    )
  } else {
    df_controls_merged$ControlType <- df_controls_merged$Chromosome
  }

  # ── Pure plotly (no static image) ──
  p <- plot_ly(df_controls_merged,
               x = ~SampleLabel,
               y = ~MethylationPercentage,
               color = ~ControlType,
               type = "bar",
               text = ~paste0("Sample: ", Sample,
                              "<br>Status: ", Status,
                              "<br>Control: ", Chromosome,
                              if ("ExpectedMeth" %in% colnames(df_controls_merged))
                                paste0("<br>Expected: ", ExpectedMeth)
                              else "",
                              "<br>Meth: ",
                              round(MethylationPercentage, 2), "%"),
               hoverinfo = "text") %>%
    layout(
      title = "Control Genome Methylation -- All Samples",
      xaxis = list(title = "", tickangle = 45),
      yaxis = list(title = "Methylation (%)", range = c(0, 105)),
      barmode = "group",
      shapes = list(
        list(type = "line", x0 = 0, x1 = 1, xref = "paper",
             y0 = 5, y1 = 5, line = list(color = "red", dash = "dash", width = 1)),
        list(type = "line", x0 = 0, x1 = 1, xref = "paper",
             y0 = 95, y1 = 95, line = list(color = "darkgreen", dash = "dash", width = 1))
      ),
      annotations = list(
        list(x = 0.01, y = 7, xref = "paper", yref = "y",
             text = "5% unmeth. threshold", showarrow = FALSE,
             font = list(color = "red", size = 10)),
        list(x = 0.01, y = 92, xref = "paper", yref = "y",
             text = "95% meth. threshold", showarrow = FALSE,
             font = list(color = "darkgreen", size = 10))
      )
    )

  p

} else {
  cat('<div class="qc-box ok-card">\n')
  cat('<h4>Control Genomes</h4>\n')
  cat('<p>No control genome data detected (pUC19, Lambda, etc.). ')
  cat('This is normal if spike-in controls were not used.</p>\n')
  cat('</div>\n')
}
```

## Analysed Samples Only

```{r controls_analysed, fig.height=5}
if (!is.null(df_controls_merged) && nrow(df_controls_merged) > 0) {

  df_ctrl_current <- df_controls_merged[df_controls_merged$Status == "Analysed", ]

  if (nrow(df_ctrl_current) > 0) {

    if ("ExpectedMeth" %in% colnames(df_ctrl_current)) {
      df_ctrl_current$ControlType <- ifelse(
        df_ctrl_current$ExpectedMeth == "high",
        paste0(df_ctrl_current$Chromosome, " (expect HIGH)"),
        paste0(df_ctrl_current$Chromosome, " (expect LOW)")
      )
    } else {
      df_ctrl_current$ControlType <- df_ctrl_current$Chromosome
    }

    p <- ggplot(df_ctrl_current,
                aes(x = Sample, y = MethylationPercentage,
                    fill = ControlType,
                    text = paste0("Sample: ", Sample,
                                  "<br>Control: ", Chromosome,
                                  if ("ExpectedMeth" %in% colnames(df_ctrl_current))
                                    paste0("<br>Expected: ", ExpectedMeth)
                                  else "",
                                  "<br>Meth: ",
                                  round(MethylationPercentage, 2), "%"))) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge",
               color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
      scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 5, linetype = "dashed",
                 color = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 95, linetype = "dashed",
                 color = "darkgreen", linewidth = 0.5) +
      labs(title = "Control Genome Methylation -- Analysed Samples",
           y = "Methylation (%)", x = "",
           fill = "Control") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
      theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

    ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")
  } else {
    cat("No control genome data for analysed samples.\n")
  }
}
```

## Data Table

```{r controls_table}
if (!is.null(df_controls_merged) && nrow(df_controls_merged) > 0) {

  cols_to_show <- intersect(
    c("Sample", "Chromosome", "ExpectedMeth",
      "MethylationPercentage", "CpG_Count", "Coverage", "Status"),
    colnames(df_controls_merged)
  )

  ctrl_display <- df_controls_merged[, cols_to_show]

  # Add a pass/fail column
  if ("ExpectedMeth" %in% colnames(ctrl_display)) {
    ctrl_display$QC_Check <- ifelse(
      ctrl_display$ExpectedMeth == "high",
      ifelse(ctrl_display$MethylationPercentage >= 95, "PASS", "WARN"),
      ifelse(ctrl_display$MethylationPercentage <= 5,  "PASS", "WARN")
    )
  }

  dt <- datatable(ctrl_display,
            options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 30),
            caption = "Control genome QC (all samples)")

  if ("MethylationPercentage" %in% colnames(ctrl_display)) {
    dt <- DT::formatRound(dt, columns = "MethylationPercentage", digits = 2)
  }

  if ("Status" %in% colnames(ctrl_display)) {
    dt <- DT::formatStyle(dt, "Status",
                           backgroundColor = DT::styleEqual(
                             c("Analysed", "Excluded"),
                             c("#d5f5e3", "#fadbd8")))
  }

  if ("QC_Check" %in% colnames(ctrl_display)) {
    dt <- DT::formatStyle(dt, "QC_Check",
                           backgroundColor = DT::styleEqual(
                             c("PASS", "WARN"),
                             c("#d5f5e3", "#fcf3cf")),
                           fontWeight = DT::styleEqual(
                             c("PASS", "WARN"),
                             c("normal", "bold")))
  }

  dt
}
```

---

# QC Assessment

```{r qc_flags, results='asis'}
flags <- list()

# ── Flag: control genome checks (differentiated by expected type) ──
if (!is.null(df_controls_merged) && nrow(df_controls_merged) > 0 &&
    "ExpectedMeth" %in% colnames(df_controls_merged)) {

  # Unmethylated controls that are too HIGH
  unmeth <- df_controls_merged[df_controls_merged$ExpectedMeth == "low", ]
  if (nrow(unmeth) > 0) {
    bad_unmeth <- unmeth[unmeth$MethylationPercentage > 5, ]

    if (nrow(bad_unmeth) > 0) {
      bad_analysed <- bad_unmeth[bad_unmeth$Status == "Analysed", ]
      bad_excluded <- bad_unmeth[bad_unmeth$Status == "Excluded", ]

      if (nrow(bad_analysed) > 0) {
        flags[[length(flags) + 1]] <- list(
          level = "WARNING",
          msg = paste0(
            "Unmethylated control(s) > 5% in ANALYSED samples: ",
            paste(unique(paste0(bad_analysed$Sample, "/",
                                bad_analysed$Chromosome)),
                  collapse = ", "),
            ". This indicates INCOMPLETE bisulfite conversion."))
      }
      if (nrow(bad_excluded) > 0) {
        flags[[length(flags) + 1]] <- list(
          level = "INFO",
          msg = paste0(
            "Unmethylated control(s) > 5% in EXCLUDED samples: ",
            paste(unique(paste0(bad_excluded$Sample, "/",
                                bad_excluded$Chromosome)),
                  collapse = ", "),
            ". (Already excluded.)"))
      }
    }
  }

  # Methylated controls that are too LOW
  meth <- df_controls_merged[df_controls_merged$ExpectedMeth == "high", ]
  if (nrow(meth) > 0) {
    bad_meth <- meth[meth$MethylationPercentage < 95, ]

    if (nrow(bad_meth) > 0) {
      bad_analysed <- bad_meth[bad_meth$Status == "Analysed", ]
      bad_excluded <- bad_meth[bad_meth$Status == "Excluded", ]

      if (nrow(bad_analysed) > 0) {
        flags[[length(flags) + 1]] <- list(
          level = "WARNING",
          msg = paste0(
            "Methylated control(s) < 95% in ANALYSED samples: ",
            paste(unique(paste0(bad_analysed$Sample, "/",
                                bad_analysed$Chromosome)),
                  collapse = ", "),
            ". This indicates OVER-CONVERSION (bisulfite too aggressive)."))
      }
      if (nrow(bad_excluded) > 0) {
        flags[[length(flags) + 1]] <- list(
          level = "INFO",
          msg = paste0(
            "Methylated control(s) < 95% in EXCLUDED samples: ",
            paste(unique(paste0(bad_excluded$Sample, "/",
                                bad_excluded$Chromosome)),
                  collapse = ", "),
            ". (Already excluded.)"))
      }
    }
  }

} else if (!is.null(df_controls_merged) && nrow(df_controls_merged) > 0) {
  # Fallback if no ExpectedMeth column
  high_ctrl <- df_controls_merged$MethylationPercentage > 5
  if (any(high_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    bad <- df_controls_merged[high_ctrl, ]
    flags[[length(flags) + 1]] <- list(
      level = "WARNING",
      msg = paste0(
        "Control genome methylation > 5% detected for: ",
        paste(unique(bad$Sample), collapse = ", ")))
  }
}

# ── Flag: low coverage samples ──
if (!is.null(df_stats) && nrow(df_stats) > 0) {
  indiv <- df_stats[df_stats$Type == "Individual", ]
  if (nrow(indiv) > 1) {
    med <- median(indiv$PositionCount, na.rm = TRUE)
    low <- indiv[indiv$PositionCount < med * 0.5, ]
    if (nrow(low) > 0) {
      flags[[length(flags) + 1]] <- list(
        level = "WARNING",
        msg = paste0(
          "Low coverage samples (< 50% of median): ",
          paste(low$Sample, collapse = ", ")))
    }
  }
}

# ── Flag: excluded samples reminder ──
if (n_excluded > 0) {
  flags[[length(flags) + 1]] <- list(
    level = "INFO",
    msg = paste0(
      n_excluded, " sample(s) excluded from analysis: ",
      paste(excluded, collapse = ", ")))
}

if (length(flags) == 0) {
  cat('<div class="qc-box ok-card">\n')
  cat('<h4>All QC Checks Passed</h4>\n')
  cat('<p>No issues detected.</p>\n')
  cat('</div>\n')
} else {
  for (f in flags) {
    if (f$level == "WARNING") {
      cls <- "warn-card"
      icon <- "WARNING"
    } else {
      cls <- "info-card"
      icon <- "INFO"
    }
    cat(sprintf('<div class="qc-box %s">\n', cls))
    cat(sprintf('<h4>%s</h4>\n', icon))
    cat(sprintf('<p>%s</p>\n', f$msg))
    cat('</div>\n')
  }
}
```

---

# Session Info

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
